---
title: "Training"
---

# Training and Capacity Building

This section is dedicated to training, short courses, tutorials, and capacity-building activities in biostatistics, epidemiology, public health, and artificial intelligence.

## Training Areas

### Biostatistics
- Introduction to biostatistics
- Regression modeling
- Survival analysis
- Multilevel modeling
- Bayesian statistics

### Epidemiology
- Clinical epidemiology
- Public health study design
- Maternal and child health research
- Disease burden analysis

### Statistical Software
- R programming
- Quarto for reproducible research
- REDCap for research data management
- STATA, SPSS, and SAS

### Artificial Intelligence in Health
- Machine learning for health data
- Interpretable AI
- Federated learning
- AI for public health decision-making

## Future Training Vision

The laboratory will provide workshops, tutorials, mentoring, and collaborative training for students, researchers, clinicians, and public health professionals in Ethiopia and beyond.
